title: Easter escapade
description: cool modpack giving some easter related features and giving that overall relaxing spring feel
body:
Welcome to **Easter escapade**, a heartwarming and **cozy Minecraft modpack designed to capture the peaceful charm of springtime** and the playful magic of Easter. This modpack blends stunning visuals with a laid-back, **relaxing** vibe — perfect for unwinding and discovering hidden surprises along the way.

Immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty of shaders like **Complementary** or **BSL**, which bring soft lighting, gentle sun rays, and reflective water to life. Paired with the **Fresh Animations texture pack**, the world feels more alive than ever, with animals and villagers moving naturally and expressively.

Mods introduce** hidden Easter eggs** (literally!) and playful seasonal surprises — but the fun lies in discovering them yourself! **Adorable bunnies**, decorated eggs and more are scattered throughout the world.

And with **multiplayer support** allowing you to enjoy this feeling with friends!
